body.docCnt: ##接口调用地址 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/custom-file/batch-add 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/custom-file/batch-add ## 接口描述 批量新增自定义档案接口 接口所属功能路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 自定义档案 接口调用注意事项： * 接口调用单次最大支持50条； * 接口不支持部分成功，单次接口调用全量成功/失败； ## 调用方式 METHOD: POST CONTENT-TYPE: application/json ## 接口输入参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CF100000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileName","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%221%22","desc":"%20*%201-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%200-%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileType","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"MULTI_LEVEL","desc":"%20*%20MULTI_LEVEL-%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%0A*%20SINGLE_LEVEL-%E6%97%A0%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7"}}]}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}] ## 接口输出参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}] ## 接口调用示例 ### 请求 ```json [ { "customFileId": "CF10000", "customFileName": "档案1号", "status": "1", "customFileType": "MULTI_LEVEL" }, { "customFileId": "CF20000", "customFileName": "档案2号", "status": "1", "customFileType": "SINGLE_LEVEL" } ] ``` ### 返回 ```json { "returnCode": "SUC0000", "success": true, "message": "成功" } ``` ```json { "returnCode": "EROOR1", "success": false, "message": "不存在的档案编码【CUS1000】请核对后重试" } ``` ## 错误码说明 | 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案| | --- | --- | --- | | SUC0000| 成功| 成功| | EROOR1| 系统异常| 系统错误，联系管理员处理| | EROOR2| 业务执行错误| 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/custom-file/batch-add

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/custom-file/batch-add

接口描述

批量新增自定义档案接口

接口所属功能路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 自定义档案

接口调用注意事项：

  • 接口调用单次最大支持50条；
  • 接口不支持部分成功，单次接口调用全量成功/失败；

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CF100000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileName","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%221%22","desc":"%20*%201-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%200-%E5%81%9C%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileType","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"MULTI_LEVEL","desc":"%20*%20MULTI_LEVEL-%E5%A4%9A%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7%0A*%20SINGLE_LEVEL-%E6%97%A0%E5%B1%82%E7%BA%A7"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求

[
    {
        "customFileId": "CF10000",
        "customFileName": "档案1号",
        "status": "1",
        "customFileType": "MULTI_LEVEL"
    },
    {
        "customFileId": "CF20000",
        "customFileName": "档案2号",
        "status": "1",
        "customFileType": "SINGLE_LEVEL"
    }
]

返回

{  
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",  
    "success": true,  
    "message": "成功"  
}  

{  
    "returnCode": "EROOR1",  
    "success": false,  
    "message": "不存在的档案编码【CUS1000】请核对后重试"  
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
SUC0000 成功 成功
EROOR1 系统异常 系统错误，联系管理员处理
EROOR2 业务执行错误 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试
body.menuLevelName: 开发文档/智能费控/档案信息/自定义档案
